attributes.action: I’d like a statue of Jesus Christ put up in Londons Trafalgar Square
attributes.background: I’d like them to build a giant statue of Jesus Christ as this is a christen country

rejection.details:
Decisions about erecting statues or memorials in specific locations is a matter for individual local authorities and landowners, not the Government or House of Commons.

If you would like a statue of Jesus Christ to be erected, you could write directly to your local authority or a local councillor requesting this, or you could try writing to your local MP asking them to support your request.

You can find contact details for your local council here: https://www.gov.uk/find-local-council

You can find contact details for your local councillors here: https://www.gov.uk/find-your-local-councillors

You can find contact details for your local MP here: https://www.parliament.uk/get-involved/contact-an-mp-or-lord/contact-your-mp/
